Content: help me design a planner for my degree

Hello there! I'd be happy to help you design a planner for your degree here at the University of Southern Indiana. That's a great step towards academic success!

To get started and make sure we create the best plan for you, could you please tell me which degree program you're interested in pursuing? We offer:

1.  **Computer Science Major, B.S. (CS-BS)**
2.  **Computer Information Systems Major, B.A./B.S. (CIS-BS)**

Once I know which program you're aiming for, we can start looking at the requirements and map out your courses. Also, if you have any idea of how many credits you're looking to take per semester (full-time, part-time), or if you have any transfer credits, that would be helpful to know as well!
